docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CONG, YANJIN
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LU, ZEWEN
REMARK: RECEIVED RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE ON 02/07/2025. REJECTION LETTER INCLUDING SOME EXHIBITS MAILED TO THE PLAINTIFF. RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,993.44 FILED BY LU, ZEWEN AS TO DEFENDANT CONG, YANJIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LU, ZEWEN
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DENIED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY LU, ZEWEN CONG, YANJIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LU, ZEWEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONG, YANJIN $1,972.71 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,022.71, $950.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT AND STATUTORY DAMAGES ($950 - CCP 195.51M) $15 CHAIR + $57.71 HOSTEL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CONG, YANJIN
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PARTIES TO EXCHANGE EXHIBITS
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 05/13/2025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
DECLARATION CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LU, ZEWEN
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 09/27/2025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2025 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAY-02-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PLAINTIFF ZEWEN LU AND DEFENDANT YANJIN CONG VIA ZOOM. ALSO, APPEARING WERE MANDARIN INTERPRETERS HSIN-JU CHANG FOR PLAINTIFF AND AMANDA PEETERS FOR DEFENDANT. PARTIES WERE INSTRUCTED TO EXCHANGE EXHIBITS PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE VIA EMAIL OR MAIL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
CONTINUANCE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINITFF RETURNED, RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTRD UNKNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAWN PAYNE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ZEWEN LU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YANJIN CONG IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAIN. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2025 - JUDGMENT.
